title: Data Through Design
author: Unknown
description: An annual exhibition featuring art works that creatively analyze, interpret and interrogate data made available in New York City’s Open Data portal.

title: Time Portal
author: u/1kj57ek
description: An app to explore historical photos of New York City, with photos geolocated on an interactive map.

title: NYC Open Data Project Gallery
author: Unknown
description: A collection of projects that use open data in New York City, including maps, visualizations, and other interactive tools.

title: Context Explorer NYC
author: Unknown
description: A project that allows users to search and view New York City restaurant violations using data published by the NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene.

title: NYC Restaurant Violations
author: Unknown
description: A project that allows users to search and view New York City restaurant violations using data published by the NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene.

title: SquirrelTales
author: Unknown
description: A project that uses data to tell stories about squirrels in New York City.

title: Civil Service NYC
author: Unknown
description: A project that provides information about civil service in New York City.

title: Stop, Question, and Frisk Visualized
author: Unknown
description: A project that visualizes data about stop, question, and frisk incidents in New York City.

title: An Interactive Visualization of NYC Street Trees
author: Unknown
description: A project that provides an interactive visualization of street trees in New York City.

title: Aura
author: Unknown
description: A project that uses generative AI to create unique, personalized experiences based on user data.
